561	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — sectionwise reduction of the free Čech complex -/
562	
563	/-- **Evaluation preserves the degreewise coproduct of the free Čech complex.**
564	
565	The objectwise-reduction `quasiIso_of_evaluation` requires understanding the evaluation of
566	`cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰` at an open `V`.  Since the degree-`p` term is the coproduct
567	`∐_{σ : Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀} freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)` and the evaluation functor
568	preserves finite colimits (`PresheafOfModules.Finite.evaluation_preservesFiniteColimits`,
569	with `Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀` finite as `𝒰.I₀` is finite), evaluating commutes with the
570	coproduct:
571	`(evaluation V).obj (K(𝒰)_p) ≅ ∐_σ (evaluation V).obj (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))`.
572	This is the degree-`p` entry point for the sectionwise description
573	(blueprint `lem:cech_free_eval_sectionwise`); each evaluated summand
574	`(evaluation V).obj (freeYoneda.obj W) = (ModuleCat.free (O_X(V))).obj (V ⟶ W)` is the free
575	`O_X(V)`-module on the (subsingleton) hom-set `V ⟶ W`, i.e. `O_X(V)` if `V ≤ W` and `0`
576	otherwise.
577	
578	Project-local: the assembly of evaluation-preserves-coproduct with the free Čech complex
579	has no Mathlib counterpart. -/
580	noncomputable def cechFreeEval_X (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
581	    (V : (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ) (p : ℕ) :
582	    (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj V).obj ((cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).X p)
583	      ≅ ∐ fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
584	          (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj V).obj
585	            (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)) := by
586	  haveI : Limits.PreservesColimitsOfShape (Discrete (Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀))
587	      (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj V) := by
588	    haveI := PresheafOfModules.Finite.evaluation_preservesFiniteColimits X.ringCatSheaf.obj V
589	    infer_instance
590	  exact Limits.PreservesCoproduct.iso _ _
591	
592	/-- **Evaluating `freeYoneda W` at an open `V ⊄ W` gives the zero module.**
593	
594	`(evaluation V).obj (freeYoneda.obj W) = (ModuleCat.free (O_X(V))).obj (V ⟶ W)` is the free
595	`O_X(V)`-module on the hom-set `V ⟶ W`.  When `V ≰ W` that hom-set is empty, so the module
596	is `0`.  This is the per-summand input to the empty case of the sectionwise reduction (and
597	kills the non-`I₁` summands in the nonempty case).
598	
599	Project-local: a degreewise vanishing statement for the project's `freeYoneda`. -/
600	lemma freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le {W V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (h : ¬ V ≤ W) :
601	    Limits.IsZero ((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
602	      (freeYoneda.obj W)) := by
603	  haveI : IsEmpty (V ⟶ W) := ⟨fun f => h (leOfHom f)⟩
604	  haveI : Subsingleton ↑((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj
605	      (Opposite.op V)).obj (freeYoneda.obj W)) :=
606	    ⟨fun a b => Finsupp.ext (fun x => (IsEmpty.false x).elim)⟩
607	  exact ModuleCat.isZero_of_subsingleton _
608	
609	/-- **Evaluating `freeYoneda W` at an open `V ≤ W` gives `O_X(V)`.**
610	
611	When `V ≤ W` the hom-set `V ⟶ W` is a singleton (`Unique`), so the free `O_X(V)`-module on it
612	is `O_X(V)` itself.  This is the per-summand identification of the surviving (`I₁`) summands in
613	the sectionwise reduction (blueprint `lem:cech_free_eval_sectionwise`): together with
614	`freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le` it gives the description
615	`K(𝒰)_p(V) = ⊕_{σ : V ≤ U_σ} O_X(V)`.
616	
617	Project-local: a degreewise identification for the project's `freeYoneda`. -/
618	noncomputable def freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le {W V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (h : V ≤ W) :
619	    (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj (freeYoneda.obj W)
620	      ≅ ModuleCat.of (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V))
621	          (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
622	  haveI : Unique (V ⟶ W) := ⟨⟨homOfLE h⟩, fun _ => Subsingleton.elim _ _⟩
623	  (Finsupp.LinearEquiv.finsuppUnique _ _ (V ⟶ W)).toModuleIso

625	/-- A coproduct of zero objects is a zero object: every coproduct injection out of a zero
626	object is zero, so the identity of the coproduct is zero. -/
627	lemma isZero_sigma_of_forall_isZero {C : Type*} [Category C] [Limits.HasZeroMorphisms C]
628	    {β : Type*} (f : β → C) [Limits.HasCoproduct f]
629	    (h : ∀ b, Limits.IsZero (f b)) : Limits.IsZero (∐ f) := by
630	  rw [Limits.IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero]
631	  apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext
632	  intro b
633	  rw [Category.comp_id, Limits.comp_zero]
634	  exact (h b).eq_zero_of_src _

636	/-- **Empty case of the sectionwise reduction (object level).**
637	
638	If no cover member `U_i` contains `V` (i.e. `I₁(V) = ∅`), then the degree-`p` term of the
639	free Čech complex evaluates to the zero module at `V`.  Indeed every multi-index intersection
640	`coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 (σ 0)`, so `V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ` would force `V` into a
641	cover member, contradiction; hence each summand vanishes by `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le`
642	and the coproduct is zero.  This is the object-level input to
643	`cech_free_eval_empty`. -/
644	lemma cechFreeEval_isZero_of_isEmpty (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
645	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) (hV : ∀ i, ¬ V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i) :
646	    Limits.IsZero ((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
647	      ((cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).X p)) := by
648	  refine Limits.IsZero.of_iso ?_ (cechFreeEval_X 𝒰 (Opposite.op V) p)
649	  apply isZero_sigma_of_forall_isZero
650	  intro σ
651	  apply freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le
652	  intro hle
653	  exact hV (σ 0) (le_trans hle (iInf_le (fun k => coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k)) 0))

657	If no cover member contains `V` (`I₁(V) = ∅`), then `O_𝒰(V) = 0`.  The cover structure
658	presheaf is the image of the augmentation `cechFreeAug`, so `O_𝒰` is an epimorphic image of
659	`K(𝒰)_0` via `factorThruImage`; evaluating at `V` (which preserves epimorphisms) gives an
660	epimorphism out of the zero module `(evaluation V).obj (K(𝒰)_0)`
661	(`cechFreeEval_isZero_of_isEmpty`), so its target is zero. -/
662	lemma coverStructurePresheaf_eval_isZero_of_isEmpty (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
663	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (hV : ∀ i, ¬ V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i) :
664	    Limits.IsZero ((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj

670	    Functor.map_epi (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V))
671	      (Limits.factorThruImage (cechFreeAug 𝒰))
672	  exact Limits.IsZero.of_epi
673	    ((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).map
674	      (Limits.factorThruImage (cechFreeAug 𝒰)))
675	    (cechFreeEval_isZero_of_isEmpty 𝒰 V 0 hV)

710	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — degreewise engine model of the evaluated free complex
711	
712	The nonempty-case analysis of the evaluated free Čech complex needs an explicit degreewise
713	identification of `(evaluation V).obj (K(𝒰)_p)` with the constant-coefficient combinatorial model
714	`∐_{σ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)`, where `I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}`.  This section builds that
715	degreewise object isomorphism as the composite
716	
717	  `(eval V)(K_p) ≅[cechFreeEval_X] ∐_{σ : Fin(p+1)→I₀} (eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)`
718	  `           ≅[drop-zeros]      ∐_{σ : V ≤ U_σ} (eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)`
719	  `           ≅[whiskerEquiv]    ∐_{τ : Fin(p+1)→I₁(V)} O_X(V),`
720	
721	using `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le` to discard the summands with `V ≰ U_σ` and
722	`freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le` to identify each surviving summand with `O_X(V)`.  The differential
723	match turning this degreewise iso into an iso of chain complexes is the genuine remaining
724	bottleneck and is NOT discharged here. -/
725	
726	/-- `V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ` holds iff every value of `σ` indexes a cover member containing `V`;
727	i.e. `σ` factors through `I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}`.  This is the index-splitting criterion separating
728	the surviving summands of the evaluated free Čech complex from the vanishing ones. -/
729	lemma le_coverInterOpen_iff (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
730	    {κ : Type} (σ : κ → 𝒰.I₀) :
731	    V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ ↔ ∀ k, V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) := by
732	  simp only [coverInterOpen, le_iInf_iff]
733	
734	/-- **Reindexing the surviving multi-indices.** The multi-indices `σ : Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀` with
735	`V ≤ U_σ` are in bijection with the maps `Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)` into the subtype
736	`I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}` of cover members containing `V`.  This bijection feeds
737	`Limits.Sigma.whiskerEquiv` to collapse the
738	surviving coproduct onto the constant-coefficient combinatorial index `Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)`. -/
739	def survivingEquiv (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
740	    (Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) ≃
741	      {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} where
742	  toFun τ := ⟨fun k => (τ k).1, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V _).2 fun k => (τ k).2⟩
743	  invFun σ := fun k => ⟨σ.1 k, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V σ.1).1 σ.2 k⟩
744	  left_inv τ := by funext k; rfl
745	  right_inv σ := by ext k; rfl
746	
747	/-- **Drop-zeros isomorphism.** Evaluating the degree-`p` free Čech term at `V` and splitting off
748	the vanishing summands: the full coproduct over all `σ : Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀` is isomorphic to the
749	coproduct over the *surviving* multi-indices `{σ : V ≤ U_σ}`, because every non-surviving summand
750	`(eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)` (with `V ≰ U_σ`) is a zero object
751	(`freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le`).  This is the first of the two halves identifying the evaluated
752	term with the combinatorial model. -/
753	noncomputable def cechFreeEvalDropZeros (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
754	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
755	    (∐ fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
756	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
757	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))) ≅
758	      (∐ fun s : {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} =>
759	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
760	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 s.1))) where
761	  hom := Limits.Sigma.desc fun σ => by
762	    classical
763	    exact if h : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ then
764	      Limits.Sigma.ι (fun s : {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} =>
765	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
766	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 s.1))) ⟨σ, h⟩
767	    else 0
768	  inv := Limits.Sigma.desc fun s =>
769	    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
770	      (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
771	        (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))) s.1
772	  hom_inv_id := by
773	    apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext; intro σ
774	    rw [Limits.Sigma.ι_desc_assoc, Category.comp_id]
775	    by_cases h : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ
776	    · rw [dif_pos h, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]
777	    · rw [dif_neg h, Limits.zero_comp]
778	      exact ((freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le h).eq_zero_of_src _).symm
